title: IMMZD18SRabies ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SRabies ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: To be determined by Member States-0
First rabies dose from the primary series was administered-115
Second rabies dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed-92

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SRabies ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SRabiesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
